candidates.row_label: Depreciation and impairment of non-current assets
candidates.why: Only visible operating D&A-like row, but it is a general operating line and not identified as COGS/cost-of-revenues specific; selected COGS bucket is the explicit total row 'Cost of revenues/COGS', so there is no clear separate COGS D&A row to add.

variables.notes: No explicit depreciation/amortisation row is shown as belonging to COGS/cost of revenues. Conservatively assume any COGS-related D&A is embedded in 'Cost of revenues/COGS'.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and impairment of non-current assets
candidates.why: Separate operating expense line appearing alongside the selected SG&A component rows ('Staff costs', 'Other external expenses', 'Administrative expenses', 'Cars, operating expenses'), which suggests depreciation is outside those selected rows. However, the label also includes impairment, so it is not a clean D&A-only row.

variables.notes: There is a separate operating line for 'Depreciation and impairment of non-current assets' at the same level as SG&A components, which suggests some overhead D&A may sit outside the selected XSGA component bucket. But because the row mixes depreciation with impairment, adding it as XSGA_DA could overstate pure D&A. Manual review is needed.
